title: my first time in italy 🍋 a week in amalfi coast & sorrento, girls trip, beaches & lots of food

questions.question: What does the speaker say about Positano in this video?
options: A) It's her first time visiting
B) She has been there many times
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第37条，'It is my first time here and we're staying in Positano'，说明这是她第一次来这里。

questions.question: What does 'What is life right now?' mean in this context?
options: A) She is asking a philosophical question
B) She is expressing surprise and disbelief at how amazing the view is
C) She wants to know the time
D) She is confused about her life
questions.explanation: 这是一个感叹句，表示对当前景色或体验的极度赞叹，意思是"这简直不可思议"或"生活太美好了"。

questions.question: What does 'This is literally insane' mean?
options: A) This is crazy or amazing
questions.explanation: 'Insane' 在这里是口语表达，表示某事令人难以置信的棒或疯狂，是一种强烈的感叹。

questions.question: Who is the speaker traveling with for the next seven days?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第7条，'best friends for the next seven days'，说明她是和闺蜜一起旅行。

questions.question: What did the speaker originally plan to get?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第36条，'I had planned on getting vanilla, but then she recommended this one'，她原本想要香草味的。

questions.question: How much was the item that cost €78?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第21条，'€78, which is crazy'，78欧元被认为是相当贵的，'crazy'在这里表示贵得惊人。

questions.question: What does 'perk me up' mean in 'I feel like gelato will perk me up'?
options: B) Make me happy and energetic
questions.explanation: 'Perk me up' 是一个短语，意思是让我精神起来，让我振作起来，通常指通过食物或饮料提神。

questions.question: What does 'fading' mean in 'I'm honestly like kind of fading now'?
options: B) Feeling sleepy or losing energy
questions.explanation: 'Fading' 在这里表示精神逐渐涣散，感到困倦或疲惫。

questions.question: What does 'insane' mean in 'this restaurant's view is insane'?
questions.explanation: 'Insane' 在描述风景时表示令人难以置信的美丽或壮观。

questions.question: What time did they have dinner according to the subtitle?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第23条，'Had dinner at 7:00 p.m. and it is now 1:00 p.m. the next day'，他们在晚上7点吃晚餐。

questions.question: Describe a memorable meal or food experience from your own trip. What made it special?
questions.explanation: 这是一道开放式口语题，要求学生描述一次难忘的旅行美食经历。
questions.referenceAnswer: 学生应描述：1) 食物的种类和名称 2) 用餐的地点环境 3) 为什么这个经历难忘 4) 当时的感受
questions.hint: Think about: What did you eat? Where did you have it? Who were you with? Why was it special?

questions.question: What does the speaker say about the water?
options: A) The water is very warm
B) The water is so blue
C) The water is very dirty
D) The water is too cold
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第46条，'The water is so blue'，她形容水非常蓝。

questions.question: What kind of clothing pattern does the speaker mention she loves?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第47条，'I love red gingham as you guys probably know'，她喜欢红色格子图案。

questions.question: If you could visit the Amalfi Coast, what activities would you want to do and why?
questions.explanation: 这是一道开放式口语题，想象力题，考查学生用英语表达旅行愿望的能力。
questions.referenceAnswer: 学生应提到：1) 想做的活动（如海滩、观光、美食等）2) 原因 3) 期望的体验
questions.hint: Consider: beaches, boat trips, local food, sightseeing, shopping - what attracts you most?

questions.question: What did the speaker get for lunch that looked like a lobster dish?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第33条，'I got a lobster burger'，她午餐吃了龙虾汉堡。

questions.question: What does 'little beach day' mean in the context?
options: B) Spending a few hours at the beach
D) A beach that is small in size
questions.explanation: 'Beach day' 指在海滩度过的一天或一段时间，'little' 表示短暂的几个小时。

questions.question: What does 'starving' mean in 'we're getting hungry and we're starving'?
questions.explanation: 'Starving' 是非常饥饿的意思，比 'hungry' 程度更强。

questions.question: Based on the context, what does 'You can download the sale app' most likely mean?
options: A) An app for buying discounted items
B) An app for selling things
questions.explanation: 'Sale app' 在这里应该是购物的意思，结合后面提到的 'SLY is an eim app that helps you stay connected'，这是一个与购物或优惠相关的应用。

questions.question: The speaker mentions she feels like she 'never been in the water' despite being at the beach. What do you think she means by this? Explain your understanding.
questions.explanation: 这是一道理解性口语题，需要学生根据上下文推断说话者的意思。
questions.referenceAnswer: 学生应理解：1) 她可能很长时间没去海边了 2) 水的触感让她感到新鲜/惊喜 3) 可能是夸张的表达，形容水很舒服
questions.hint: Think about: Is she saying she never went to the beach before? Or is she expressing how amazing the water feels right now?

questions.question: What does 'compatible' mean in 'So s is compatible with all iOS and Android devices'?
options: B) Able to work together with
questions.explanation: 'Compatible' 意思是兼容的，可以与iOS和Android设备一起使用。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean when she says 'I think this one's a little bit more flattering'?
options: A) It makes her look better
questions.explanation: 'Flattering' 意思是让人看起来更好看，这里指这件衣服更显身材或更好看。

questions.question: What does 'extreme sport' refer to in 'This is an extreme sport'?
options: A) Actual dangerous sports like bungee jumping
B) Walking on the rocky beach
questions.explanation: 根据上下文，这是在描述在多岩石的海边行走或活动，'extreme sport' 是一种夸张幽默的说法。

questions.question: What does the speaker think of the Airbnb?
questions.explanation: 根据字幕第11条，'And this is just a quick overview of our Airbnb which was really cute'，她觉得公寓非常可爱。

questions.question: The video is titled 'my first time in italy'. What do you think are the highlights of visiting a new country for the first time? Share your thoughts.
questions.explanation: 这是一道开放式讨论题，让学生分享首次访问新国家的看法和期待。
questions.referenceAnswer: 学生应讨论：1) 首次旅行的兴奋感 2) 新的文化体验 3) 美食探索 4) 结识新朋友 5) 留下深刻印象的事物
questions.hint: Consider: new experiences, different culture, food, people, scenery, and emotions when visiting somewhere for the first time.

questions.question: What does 'It's only 118' likely refer to?
questions.explanation: 结合上下文和欧洲的货币环境，'It's only 118' 很可能是指118欧元（冰激凌的价格）。
